item.title: Should we combine protocols for AI Control Research?
item.description: pspanIn AI control/spanspan class="footnote-reference" id="fnrefn0w7w9kz18q"supa href="https://www.lesswrong.com/feed.xml#fnn0w7w9kz18q"[1]/a/sup/spanspan research, we've developed many protocols: /spana href="https://www.lesswrong.com/posts/d9FJHawgkiMSPjagR/ai-control-improving-safety-despite-inte

item.title: Meeting Trump's 2030 Quantum Deadline Will be Expensive, Complex
item.description: Getting accurate visibility into IT and OT systems will be compounded by multivendor environments, misaligned update life cycles, and interoperability gaps.

item.title: Research note on negated reward hacking
item.description: pispanThis work was done as part of the BlueDot's Technical AI Safety Project Sprint and should be treated as an informal report of preliminary results done over a couple of days./span/i/ppispanThe code is available on /span/ia href="https://github.com/darklord1611/negated-reward-hacking" rel="noref

item.title: Earth may have been seeding Venus with life for billions of years
item.description: A new study suggests Earth may have been sending tiny hitchhikers to Venus for billions of years. Researchers found that asteroid impacts could launch microbes into space, where some might survive the journey and end up suspended in Venus' clouds. If future missions detect life there, there's a surp

item.title: fab: how to do (alignment) research at scale

item.title: Our research team came across a @TornadoCash DAO proposal, and we suspect it might be malicious. We are asking the community to look into this matter, details are below 👇
item.description: pOur research team came across a a href="https://nitter.net/TornadoCash" title="🌪️ Tornado.cash 🌪️"@TornadoCash/a DAO proposal, and we suspect it might be malicious. br /We are asking the community to look into this matter, details are below 👇/phr /blockquotebsergeyshemyakov, PhD 💗 (@sergeyshemyakov
